user_prompt: the SPM1423 is actually on a daughterboard that comes pre-installed in a M5Stack Core2, so if I am adding an external codec, I must remove the SPM1423
right now, please always make sure BCLK is duplicated to GPIO13, GPIO13 never has to be deconfigured
also write out the code to configure the SGTL5000 for 16 KHZ 16 bit stereo
agent_reply: Implemented.
The important bits:
- [AudioManager.cpp](D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/lib/AudioManager/AudioManager.cpp:1062) now reasserts GPIO13 as an ESP32 GPIO-matrix mirror of `I2S0O_BCK_OUT_IDX`.
- That mirror is applied after `stop_i2s()`, after NS4168 speaker setup, and after SGTL5000 full-duplex I2S setup, so GPIO13 is not intentionally deconfigured by our code.
- [AudioManager.cpp](D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/lib/AudioManager/AudioManager.cpp:1019) now drives the SGTL5000 path with `I2S_MCLK_MULTIPLE_512`, giving 8.192 MHz MCLK for 16 kHz audio.

- [control_sgtl5000.cpp](D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/lib/ExtCodec/control_sgtl5000.cpp:595) now has `configureFor16k16BitStereo()`, which sets SGTL5000 to 16 kHz, 16-bit stereo, slave I2S, 32 Fs BCLK, with ADC->I2S and I2S->DAC routing.
- [ExtCodec.cpp](D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/lib/ExtCodec/ExtCodec.cpp:314) calls that configuration during real SGTL5000 startup.
Validated with `pio run -e thefly_sec0`, which passed. `git diff --check` also passed, aside from the repo’s usual CRLF warnings. I also restored the generated `src/version.c` churn after the build.
Implemented.
The important bits:
- [AudioManager.cpp](D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/lib/AudioManager/AudioManager.cpp:1062) now reasserts GPIO13 as an ESP32 GPIO-matrix mirror of `I2S0O_BCK_OUT_IDX`.
- That mirror is applied after `stop_i2s()`, after NS4168 speaker setup, and after SGTL5000 full-duplex I2S setup, so GPIO13 is not intentionally deconfigured by our code.
- [AudioManager.cpp](D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/lib/AudioManager/AudioManager.cpp:1019) now drives the SGTL5000 path with `I2S_MCLK_MULTIPLE_512`, giving 8.192 MHz MCLK for 16 kHz audio.

- [control_sgtl5000.cpp](D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/lib/ExtCodec/control_sgtl5000.cpp:595) now has `configureFor16k16BitStereo()`, which sets SGTL5000 to 16 kHz, 16-bit stereo, slave I2S, 32 Fs BCLK, with ADC->I2S and I2S->DAC routing.
- [ExtCodec.cpp](D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/lib/ExtCodec/ExtCodec.cpp:314) calls that configuration during real SGTL5000 startup.
Validated with `pio run -e thefly_sec0`, which passed. `git diff --check` also passed, aside from the repo’s usual CRLF warnings. I also restored the generated `src/version.c` churn after the build.
